eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Pueblo, CO; at 05:00 AM ON MAR 16, 2026 Effective until 08:00 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the Colorado Bureau of Investigation with and AMBER Child Abduction Alert. We have received this important announcement regarding an abducted Child in Pueblo. The Pueblo Police Department is searching for 16 year old, Isabella Young, last seen in person on March 13, 2026, around midnight. Isabella is described as a hispanic, female, brown hair and brown eyes, five feet two inches tall and one hundred and thirty pounds. Investigators believe Isabella may have been taken by 15 year old, hispanic, male, Jayden Trujillo, brown hair and brown eyes, five feet four inches tall and one hundred and fifty pounds and may be traveling in an unknown vehicle. Investigators believe they are in the area of Agram Street and Bohmen Avenue in Pueblo as of this morning on March 16, 2026. Jayden may be armed, use caution if contact is made. If you have any information regarding this abduction, immediately call 9 1  1.
